title: Tyler Technologies Named a Top Workplace in Troy, Michigan
text: TROY, Mich.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has been named to the Detroit Free Press' top workplaces list in Michigan for the seventh time.

title: Tyler (TYL) Helps DeKalb County Transition to SaaS Deployment
text: DeKalb County's transition to Tyler's (TYL) SaaS from on-premise installations will save the county's costs as well as the manpower necessary for managing servers and the required hardware.

title: DeKalb County, Georgia, Transitions from On-Premises to Cloud Deployment with Tyler Technologies
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced DeKalb County, Georgia, has transitioned its Tyler products from an on-premises installation to a SaaS installation.

title: Tyler Technologies: High-Quality Business But Massively Overvalued
text: Tyler Technologies is a high-quality business, which I see from the pace of revenue growth and wide profitability metrics. I like the management's prudent capital allocation and commitment to innovation. My valuation analysis suggests that massive optimism is already priced in, as TYL stock is about 40% overvalued.

title: Tyler Technologies' Plano Office Named a Top Workplace in North Texas
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has been named to The Dallas Morning News' “Top Workplaces D-FW” for 2023.

title: Tyler Technologies Announces Veterans Service Officers Excellence Award Winners
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced five winners of its first annual Veterans Service Officers (VSO) Excellence Awards.

title: 4 Stocks to Watch From a Prospering Business-Software Services Industry
text: The Zacks Business-Software Services industry players like MSCI, TYL, SNX and GWRE are poised to benefit from the robust demand trend for multi-cloud-enabled software solutions.

title: Alabama Department of Veterans Affairs Goes Live with Tyler Technologies' Platform to Support Dependents of Disabled Veterans
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the Alabama Department of Veterans Affairs has successfully gone live with Tyler's Application Platform solution.

title: Here's Why Tyler Technologies Stock Climbed Back Over $400 Today
text: Tyler Technologies experienced better-than-expected growth in its software-as-a-service business, leading to a big jump in cash flows. The company just completed one acquisition and announced two more acquisitions two days ago.

title: Tyler Technologies' stock on track for largest gain since March 2020
text: Tyler Technologies Inc.'s stock TYL, +9.73% was up 10.2% on Thursday as one of the top-performing components of the S&P 500 SPX, +1.53%, after its third-quarter earnings of $2.14 a share beat the FactSet consensus estimate of $2 a share. The public sector software and service provider's stock is on track for its largest one-day gain since it rose 10.3% on March 26, 2020, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Q3 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss
text: Tyler Technologies' (TYL) third-quarter 2023 performance reflects robust year-over-year growth in subscription revenues.

title: Tyler Technologies (TYL) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Tyler Technologies (TYL) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Tyler Technologies Reports Earnings for Third Quarter 2023
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies reports its earnings for third quarter 2023.

title: Ohio voters could legalize marijuana use next week, polls show
text: Two separate polls in Ohio show that the Buckeye state's residents support ballot Issue No. 2 to allow adult-use cannabis that goes before voters on Nov. 7.
